loop1.title: Power Quality
loop1.note: Showing current and voltage THD, H5/H7 harmonics, and IEEE 519 compliance; flicker and crest factor are not measured for this asset.

loop1.title: Distortion & Harmonic Profile
loop1.note: Showing V-THD, I-THD, and H5/H7 trends — per-phase THD and harmonic order data is logged for this asset; scalar KPIs (yMax, yMin, averageStat) are omitted as they are not directly measured by this meter.

loop1.title: Load Impact & Transformer Stress
loop1.note: Showing PF Health and K-Stress trends; K-Watch, Lag Watch, and PF Target thresholds are omitted as they require nameplate/config constants not available for this asset.

loop2: GIC-01-N2-Spare has no logged data — every card renders its real component with per-leaf-null leaves (honest empty). 262 data-bearing alternative(s) offered in the picker.
